name: @metorial/cloudlayer
description: Generate PDF and image documents from HTML content, URLs, or templates. Convert web pages and HTML into PDFs with configurable paper formats, margins, headers/footers, and orientation. Generate images (PNG, JPG, WebP) from HTML or URLs with configurable viewports and transparency. Use predefined or custom Nunjucks templates with dynamic data for document generation. Batch-convert multiple URLs into a single combined PDF. Store generated assets in cloud storage with CDN access or custom S3-compatible storage. Generate image previews and thumbnails of documents. Manage jobs, check account status and credits, and receive webhook notifications on job completion.
